recommendations.title: Enhance BRSR ESG Disclosure Transparency
recommendations.description: Improve ESG disclosures in line with BRSR guidelines to avoid SEBI scrutiny and prevent a 20-40 bps increase in cost of capital.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoiding a 30 bps average increase in cost of capital on ₹22,500 Cr investment saves approximately ₹67.5 Cr annually.

recommendations.title: Implement TCFD-aligned Climate Risk Disclosure
recommendations.description: Adopt TCFD recommendations for climate risk disclosure to prevent foreign institutional investor outflows and P/E compression of 5-10%.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoiding a 7.5% average P/E compression on ₹45,000 Cr market cap preserves ₹3,375 Cr in valuation.

recommendations.title: Improve GRI ESG Reporting Quality
recommendations.description: Upgrade GRI disclosures to enhance ESG ratings and attract sustainable funds, potentially increasing valuation by 3-5%.
recommendations.profitability_link: A 4% valuation uplift on ₹45,000 Cr market cap equals ₹1,800 Cr increase in market value.

recommendations.title: Align Power Plant with EU Taxonomy Standards
recommendations.description: Ensure the new Bihar power plant meets EU Taxonomy criteria to unlock green financing and reduce cost of capital by up to 50 bps.
recommendations.profitability_link: Reducing cost of capital by 50 bps on ₹22,500 Cr investment saves ₹112.5 Cr annually.
